SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class SecurityAction

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafioschtrader.entities.SecurityAction
@Entity public class SecurityAction extends BaseID<Integer>
System-wide ISIN change event created by an admin. When a security's ISIN changes, this entity records the old and new ISIN plus references to the old and newly created security. Affected tenants can then apply or reverse the change.
